news.title: Trump lays out Iran deal demands, says he's about to make 'final determination'
news.summary: Trump's statement left unclear which of his conditions are already part of a deal that negotiators are working on to pause the U.S.-Iran war.

news.title: Dell stock skyrockets 32%, heads for best day ever as AI server revenue soars
news.summary: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018. AI server revenue soared 757% over last year.

news.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
news.summary: Elon Musk posts details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus. In a post on X, Elon Musk offers details about the deal.

news.title: Trump DOJ 'lawfare' fund temporarily blocked by judge as suit proceeds
news.summary: The DOJ has face strong criticism for the creation of a $1.8 Anti-Weaponization Fund. The fund could compensate allies of President Donald Trump.

news.title: Disney's ABC files early broadcast licenses renewal. FCC Chair vows to 'follow the facts'
news.summary: Disney said it filed renewals for eight broadcast station licenses "under protest" The FCC launched an early review years ahead of schedule, Disney said.

news.title: Even the Ronald Reagan Institute doesn’t believe the ‘waste, fraud and abuse’ baloney
news.summary: This may be the single most important issue facing U.S. democracy today, says CNN's John Sutter. Sutter: "This is the most important thing we can do for democracy in the United States"

news.title: Oil prices slide as Trump says the U.S. is close to an Iran deal
news.summary: President Donald Trump said a “final determination’ is coming on Iran. He said the U.S. will make a decision on Iran in the coming days.

news.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX IPO could quickly launch into your retirement plan
news.summary: Index funds popular with retirement plans are poised to buy SpaceX’s stock rocket-fast. SpaceX is a rocket company that has raised more than $20 billion in venture capital.

news.title: ‘He threatened to cut the roots’: A tree fell onto my neighbor’s property during a storm. Then all hell broke loose.
news.summary: A neighbor estimates damage from the tree at approximately $6,000 or more. “The neighbor estimatesDamage from the Tree at approximately £5,000 to £7,000.

news.title: Gen Alpha is learning vastly different lessons about money, depending on whether their parents are millennials or Gen X
news.summary: Gen Alpha kids raised by Gen X parents carry average savings balances that are 30% higher than their peers raised by millennials. Gen Alpha kids raise by Generation X parents have an average savings balance of $26,000. Gen X kids raise an average of $28,000, compared to $21,000 for millennials.
